name: splunk-knowledge
description: Marketplace for Splunk plugins. Five plugins: splunk-dashboard-studio (Dashboard Studio v2 authoring, 60+ skills), splunk-viz-packs (legacy v5.x Canvas 2D custom viz apps — superseded by splunk-custom-viz), splunk-spl (SPL syntax, 23 traps + 152 command refs), splunk-admin (conf files, REST API, CLI, troubleshooting), splunk-custom-viz (v6 HTML-first custom viz apps with designer-grade output).

plugins.name: splunk-dashboard-studio
plugins.description: Dashboard Studio v2 authoring toolkit. Design orchestrator (ds-couture), JSON builder (ds-create), 25 per-viz-type skills, 6 interactivity skills, 10 design reference skills, SVG generator, and validation pipeline. Canvas minimum 1920x1080. Required by splunk-viz-packs for dashboard JSON rules.

plugins.name: splunk-spl
plugins.description: SPL syntax reference. 23 silent-fail traps (eagerly loaded) + 152 per-command reference files (lazy loaded). Covers eval, stats, where, rex, tstats, lookups, subsearches. Required by both splunk-dashboard-studio and splunk-viz-packs for SPL in data sources.

plugins.name: splunk-viz-packs
plugins.description: Legacy v5.x — use splunk-custom-viz for new projects. Build themed Splunk custom viz apps — Canvas 2D rendering, shared design tokens, mood recipes, 14 viz blueprints, design scoring, anti-AI checklist, and AppInspect-ready packaging. Requires splunk-spl (SPL rules) and splunk-dashboard-studio (dashboard rules) for full functionality.

plugins.name: splunk-admin
plugins.description: Splunk administration reference — 52 conf files, REST API endpoints, CLI commands, and troubleshooting guides, plus add-on development with the UCC framework and the Splunk UI Toolkit (SUIT). For Splunk admins and add-on developers, not dashboard designers. Install separately from the dashboard/viz plugins.

plugins.name: splunk-custom-viz
plugins.description: Create installable Splunk custom visualization apps from a short brand description. HTML-first design workflow producing designer-grade output without AI-slop. Four skills (cv-scope, cv-sketch, cv-create, cv-build). Replacement for splunk-viz-packs (v5.x remains installable for legacy users).
